extract: Iron Treads (Japanese: テツノワダチ Tetsunowadachi) is a dual-type Ground/Steel Paradox Pokémon introduced in Generation IX. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, Iron Treads is said to be either a future relative of Donphan or a version of it from a parallel timeline. It also has an ancient counterpart, Great Tusk.
